name: Debt Projector & PSLF Tracker
description: Project debt payoff timelines, compare payoff strategies, visualize balance curves, and track PSLF qualifying payments.

name: Handbook Analyzer
description: Upload your district employee handbook and get an instant summary plus a Q&A chat. Surfaces leave policies, benefits, retirement options, and more.

name: Wisconsin Teacher Salary Analyzer
description: Analyze and compare Wisconsin public school staff salary data from DPI, with outlier filtering, experience-based estimation, and multi-district comparison.

name: Scholarship Value Estimator
description: See how much your scholarship time is really worth — and analyze real scholarships for eligibility fit.

name: WRS Retirement Estimator
description: Estimate Wisconsin Retirement System monthly benefits for General, Teacher, and Educational Support employees across multiple payment options and retirement ages.
